title: Console step-up return path loses project context after reauth
current_question: After recent-auth / step-up completes, the Console returns to a page that displays Project A but the management action is executed against Project B.
critical_paths: Console login -> navigate to project-scoped management page -> trigger step-up -> return to original action
Switch project -> trigger management action -> verify request target matches visible context
Step-up cancel / timeout -> verify safe fallback without wrong-target execution
acceptance_criteria: After step-up completes, the visible project/account context and request context remain aligned.
High-risk management action resumes only against the original target object.
Step-up cancel or timeout does not leave the Console in a half-authenticated or wrong-target state.

max_change_boundary.module_boundary: Console runtime / auth restore / context resume chain
forbidden_changes: No billing or entitlement rule changes
